Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "RICHTOFENSREVENGE-080F" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Richtofen's Revenge.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Made the following modifications to display all text correctly in white on the title screen: 1. Changed the JSR $1083 instruction at $0A44 to JSR $1700 instead 2. Added a routine at $1700 which sets the appropriate colour RAM locations to $01 (white) and then jumps to $1083 to carry on the normal code flow
